label: Databases & information retrieval

node.label: Databases & information retrieval
node.definition: Storage, indexing, ranking, query processing, and transactions make external knowledge accessible at scale.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Databases & information retrieval is to connect Algorithms & data structures, Statistics & experimental design to downstream capabilities including Datasets, sampling & splits, Knowledge graphs, ontologies & schemas, External retrieval & ranking.
examples: substrate for Knowledge graphs, ontologies & schemas
limitations: Its abstractions require explicit assumptions; a mathematically valid result can still be irrelevant to a mismatched empirical setting. Its direct dependencies include Algorithms & data structures, Statistics & experimental design.

dependencies.rationale: Databases & information retrieval rests on the formal or computational capabilities supplied by Algorithms & data structures.
Databases & information retrieval rests on the formal or computational capabilities supplied by Statistics & experimental design.
